LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CATHY KOHLER MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED. DEFENDANT ESTABLISHES MISTAKE, SURPRISE OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AND ACTED QUICKLY TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT. THE LAW FAVORS ADJUDICATION ON THE MERITS. DEFENDANT MUST FILE HER ANSWER ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 23, 2010. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBBINE, CSR #5797
